queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the impact of negative checking account balances on credit default probability and borrower delinquency rates.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Determinants of default: The influence of lacking a primary checking account on borrower default likelihood and financial instability.
Credit risk drivers: An empirical investigation into how extended loan durations contribute to increased default probability and portfolio risk.
